meaning: adj.(雌性动物的)动情期的,求偶期的,有发情期特征的,(雌性动物的)性欲冲动的
examples: The follicular waves of postpartum heifers is made of 3 ~ 4 waves in the first estrous cycle.
Morphologically, round, oval or fusiform mast cells were present in all stages of estrous cycle.
Histological structure of follicular system in yaks during the estrous cycle was similar to that of cattle and buffalo.
